queries.question: Display buffets and coffee shops operating from 7:30 a.m. to 4 p.m.
queries.sql:
SELECT Buffet.name
FROM Buffet
WHERE Buffet.Hours = "7.30 a.m. - 4 p.m."
UNION
SELECT Coffee_Shop.name
FROM Coffee_Shop
WHERE Coffee_Shop.Hours = "7.30 a.m. - 4 p.m."
